title: GoldenMaus's Copper Tools
body:
## ⚒️ Copper Equipment Expansion
_Give copper a real purpose!_

Tired of copper being just for decoration or lightning rods? This mod brings copper to life by adding a full set of copper tools and armor, making early-game progression more dynamic and rewarding.

## 🛡️ Features:
Copper Tools: Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe, and Sword — better than stone, with durability close to iron but slower speed.

Copper Armor: Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots — stylish and practical, offering protection between leather and iron.


Crafting follows vanilla-style recipes using copper ingots.

Armor and tools can be recycled in the furnace for copper nuggets.


## 🔧 Compatibility:
No dependencies.

Tags included for use with datapacks and mods.
